# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our application deployment without resource limits or requests. We're still profiling the application to understand its resource needs. Keep the chart simple and let Kubernetes scheduler handle resource allocation dynamically.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: nginx-service
spec:
  ports:
    - port: 80
      targetPort: http
  selector:
    app: nginx
---
apiVersion: apps/v1beta2
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: nginx-deployment
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
     app: nginx
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: nginx
    spec:
      containers:
       - image: nginx
         name: nginx
         ports:
          - containerPort: 80
            protocol: TCP
